## Source Information

- **Outlet Name**:
- **RSS Feed URL**:
- **Website**:
- **Country/Region**:
- **Language**:

## Media Bias/Fact Check Rating

Check [mediabiasfactcheck.com](https://mediabiasfactcheck.com/) for the outlet's rating:

- **Bias**: [Left / Left-Center / Center / Right-Center / Right]
- **Factual Reporting**: [Very High / High / Mostly Factual / Mixed / Low]

## Suggested Tier

- [ ] Tier 1 — Major international outlet with reliable RSS
- [ ] Tier 2 — Well-known outlet, good RSS feed
- [ ] Tier 3 — Niche or regional, optional by default

## RSS Feed Quality

- [ ] Feed provides article titles
- [ ] Feed provides descriptions or content snippets
- [ ] Feed includes publication dates
- [ ] Feed is publicly accessible (no paywall on RSS)
- [ ] Feed updates regularly (at least daily)

## Why Add This Source?

Explain why this source adds value to OpenNews (e.g., underrepresented region, fills a gap in the spectrum).
